mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plant (member_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, province_code, district_code, azimuth, tilt, is_main) values (#{memberId}, #{name}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{province.code}, #{district.code}, #{azimuth}, #{tilt}, #{isMain})
mapper.update: UPDATE plant SET is_main = 0 WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE plant SET is_main = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plant WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(accum_total), 0) AS accumTotal FROM plant_info_view
